About_&_Key_Points:
About
Cholamandalam Investment & Finance Company is one of the premier diversified non-banking finance companies in India,
engaged in providing vehicle finance, home loans and Loan against property.
[1]
Key Points
Promoter
The company is part of the Murugappa Group, a prominent Chennai-based conglomerate founded in 1900. With a $9.3 billion portfolio, the group spans three sectors with 29 businesses and nine listed companies. It operates 113 manufacturing sites in 50 countries and employs over 83,000 people.
